About

Enhancing
Natural Beauty

Zunaira Ovais is a licensed and certified permanent makeup and microblading artist with over six years of experience. Trained in Dubai with PhiBrows™ and BioTouch™, she brings international expertise to every procedure.

A graduate of Punjab University, Zunaira founded Picture Perfect in January 2018 — growing from a home-based studio to Pakistan's first dedicated medical spa.

Her clientele includes celebrities, politicians, artists, and influencers across Pakistan, recognised by leading beauty and fashion magazines.

What We Offer

Signature Treatments

01
Microblading
Hair-stroke technique creating naturally defined, fuller-looking brows lasting 12–18 months.
02
Micropigmentation
Precision pigment application for lips delivering long-lasting colour definition and shape.
03
Permanent Eyeliner
Wake up with perfectly lined eyes — smudge-proof, waterproof, and effortlessly refined.
04
Eyelash Extensions
Volume, length, and curl tailored to each client's eye shape and lifestyle.
05
Scalp Micropigmentation
Non-surgical solution for thinning hair and hairline enhancement using advanced pigmentation.
06
Advanced Aesthetics
Laser hair removal, skin tightening, facial rejuvenation and injectables in a medical spa setting.
